mano_cua.result_summary: 链接编辑弹出框打开时点击图片，弹出框关闭且图片被选中，但链接按钮仍保持高亮激活状态，B/I/S 按钮未变为灰色禁用状态，工具栏状态更新逻辑有缺陷。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Bug Confirmed: After clicking the image while the link editing popup was open, the toolbar does NOT correctly update. The link editing popup did close, the image was selected (blue border and × visible), but the link button remained highlighted/active instead of being grayed out. The B, I, S, Link buttons are NOT all grayed out as they should be for an attachment selection state. The toolbar is not properly reflecting the current selection state.
